allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Herd\\Herd.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\Herd\\Herd.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Herd\\Herd.exe"\); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($found\) { Start-Process $found; "Started: $found" } else { "Herd.exe not found in common locations"; \(Get-Command herd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source })
PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $out = herd links 2>$null; } while \(-not $? -and \(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); $out)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://rubpey-.test" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "HTTP Status: $\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } })
